name: MJFormField
title: Form Field
description: Metadata-driven, entity-aware edit/view field input. Renders the correct control for a field by reading EntityFieldInfo: foreign keys become searchable related-entity dropdowns, value-list fields become selects, booleans become checkboxes, dates/numbers/long-text get the appropriate input, and read mode renders Email/URL/Tel/Record links. Mirrors the enhanced fields used by MemberJunction's generated (CodeGen) entity forms.
functionalRequirements:
Render a single entity field as a view or edit control, driven entirely by the field's metadata (no per-field hand coding by the consumer).

- View mode: plain value, with clickable Email / URL / Tel links and clickable foreign-key / record links (via callbacks.OpenEntityRecord). Booleans show Yes/No; dates are localized.
- Edit mode: foreign-key fields render a searchable autocomplete that queries the related entity by its name field; value-list fields render a select of allowed values; booleans render a checkbox; dates render a date input; numbers a number input; long text a textarea; otherwise a text/email/url input.
- Read-only fields (primary keys, non-updatable, computed/virtual) always render as read display, even in edit mode.
- Required (non-null) fields show a marker and a required-empty validation message.
technicalDesign: Resolves field metadata from utilities.md.Entities (find by entityName, then field by fieldName). Foreign-key search and current-value name resolution use utilities.rv.RunView against the related entity (MaxRows-limited, debounced). The component is controlled: it reads `value` (falling back to record[fieldName]) and emits changes via the `onChange` callback prop, so the parent form owns draft state. It never mutates the record and never writes via BaseEntity/Metadata. No top-level imports; React is the injected global.

dataRequirements.description: Receives the record + field name through props; resolves field metadata via utilities.md and foreign-key lookups via utilities.rv.RunView.

properties.name: entityName
properties.description: Name of the entity the field belongs to (for metadata lookup).

properties.name: fieldName
properties.description: Name of the field to render.

properties.name: record
properties.description: The bound record; used as the value fallback and for joined FK display names.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Controlled value. When provided, overrides record[fieldName] (use the form's draft value).

properties.name: mode
properties.description: Render mode. 'edit'/'create' show inputs; 'view' shows read display.

properties.name: editMode
properties.description: Alternative to `mode`; true renders edit controls.

properties.name: showLabel
properties.description: Whether to render the field label.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when the user edits the field. The parameter is the new value; wire it to the form's draft state.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The new field value (FK id, selected value, boolean, date string, number, or text).

exampleUsage:
<MJFormField
  entityName={entityName}
  fieldName={f.name}
  record={record}
  value={f.name in draft ? draft[f.name] : record?.[f.name]}
  mode={mode}
  onChange={(v) => setField(f.name, v)}
  utilities={utilities}
  styles={styles}
  components={components}
  callbacks={callbacks}
/>
